actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1920635018) is FireController (guid: 0fd19a8a27a542c45932ea66cb115c58). Start() runs automatically on scene load to initialize fires using initialFireProbability=0.7, sets State values, and references AudienceController (component fileID: 865422729). Manually invoke a public, parameterless API to ensure direct script call coverage.

actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 676587433) is FireVisualsController (guid: f742c92c23cdb4c51bb7d099258cdb4b). Scene meta matches script fields: flickerIntensity=[1.95,2.05], flickerMultiplier=0.25, timeToFlicker=0.025, lights=[1975023121, 778717856], allSmoke=[1556168500,1778919060], etc. InitializeVisuals() is normally invoked automatically by FireController.Start() (guid: 0fd19a8a27a542c45932ea66cb115c58), so to avoid redundancy we manually trigger only the non-automatic visual effect update to cover public API.

actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 865422729) is AudienceController (guid: 568674ad8ac51e348a0d5515b1de19c1). Scene meta matches script fields: puppets=[1658050753,1913892541,392301220], crowdAudioSources=[2107226608,1810874850,815100929], player=1421263847, celebrationAnimator guid=00a66a0ae4c7cdf4b90cbb78134f82f9, celebrationSoundClip guid=c8ad6ccf87d28cd45891fca1eb7bbba4, crowdCelebrationSoundClip guid=fea3296555b18b341ae96c7e4ef53278, fadeController=1989938081. Trigger StartVictory() to cover public API and coroutine path (Celebrate -> 10s wait -> fadeController.FadeOut() -> 1s wait -> SceneController.GoToMenuScene). Celebrate() is invoked by StartVictory(), so no separate manual trigger to avoid redundancy.
